title: Parnassia pseudoalpicola

Parnassia pseudoalpicola is native to the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau. The plant is a perennial species with unique white to pinkish flowers. Parnassia pseudoalpicola is an alpine plant species found in high-altitude areas of the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau.
